name: Quinoa Tabooli
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large bowl, combine the cooked amaranth quinoa, chopped parsley, chopped green onion, garlic clove, dried basil, lemon juice, olive oil, and optional seasonings.
2. Mix all ingredients until well combined.
3. Place the mixture in a salad bowl lined with washed lettuce leaves.
4. Refrigerate for at least two hours to allow the flavors to meld together.
5. Fresh mint and black olives can be added as garnishes for this dish.
